title: Oak's Seed Drops Mod
description: A simple fabric mod that allows for cusomization of seed drops (WIP)
body:
# Oak's Seed Drops mod ##### Requires Cloth Config API to work!
this is a description, the name is 99% self-explanatory

Currently only config options are Carrot drops, potato drops, beetroot seed drops, melon seed drops, pumpkin seed drops, and wheat seed booster drops

Current Progress:
1.16.5: RELEASED
1.17.x: NOT BEING WORKED ON PFAQ:
PQ: Forge?
A: Simple Farming has the same feature but there is a 1.12.2 mod for this called "seed drops" or something to that effect
PQ: when will you port to
A: (For 1.12.2 and older) 1.12.2 and older is 🦀 for modders, don't use it PLEASE use 1.15.2 or 1.16.5 and we'll get talking (but I'll redirect you to the first Possible Question)
INSERT MORE PQ's here soon
